stem: Four friends Aman, Renu, Mohan and Rakesh are sitting at the corners of a square table and all are facing the centre. Only two persons are sitting between Aman and Renu. Rakesh is sitting to the immediate right of Mohan. If Aman is sitting immediately to the left of Mohan, which of the following statements is definitely true?
options: Rakesh is sitting diagonally opposite to Mohan.
Aman is sitting diagonally opposite to Renu.
Renu is sitting diagonally opposite to Mohan.
Aman is sitting diagonally opposite to Mohan.

B lives on an even-numbered floor, but not on floor 4. A lives on the lowermost floor. D is immediately above X. Who is on the topmost floor?
